The '''Seventh Fleet''' was one of the nine main interstellar battlegroups which made up the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|navy]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] government during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

The Seventh Fleet was one of the two [[Hapan]] [[Hapan Royal Navy|fleets]], along with the [[Eighth Fleet]], incorporated into the Galactic Alliance Navy.<ref name="TEA" />

It was present at the [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]], in which it was intended to strike the [[Confederation Fleet]] from the flank.

The Seventh and Eighth Fleets finally defected from the Galactic Alliance when the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] joined the [[Jedi Coalition]]. Both fleets then fought at the [[Second Battle of Roche]] along with the [[Alliance-in-exile]], the [[Maw Irregular Fleet]] and the [[Confederation]] fleets while the [[Hapan Home Fleet]] remained in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="TEA" />
